semantic_description: Scans a caller-owned null-terminated character array whose logical content is list l followed by a 0 terminator. The function counts maximal non-space word segments, where character code 32 resets the in_word flag and any other nonzero character starts or continues a word. The loop is an unbounded while(1) with an explicit break at the terminator; n may be 0, so the loop body can exit immediately. The function only reads the string and preserves the CharArray::full resource unchanged.
